## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Evidence

Link screenshots, logs, artifacts, or reproducible checks.

## AI review

Before merge, add two top-level PR comments:

`@codex review`

`@jules review`

These reviews are advisory and do not replace required CI or human approval.

## Checklist

- [ ] Latest CI is green.
- [ ] Generated files are current.
- [ ] Visual changes include evidence.
- [ ] Codex review was requested.
- [ ] Jules review was requested.
- [ ] Actionable findings are resolved or documented.
